summary: A high-stakes Seven-Card Stud game takes center stage, marked by initial tension as a player, referred to as the "Student," is accused of breaking etiquette. An unseen observer monitors the event, expressing concern over being identified by Kim Ha-Jin, a hero with magical sight, while also noting the presence of other significant figures. Against astronomical odds, the Student shockingly wins the game with a rare Four-of-a-Kind hand. Following this improbable victory, the winner's sudden display of wealth and their claimed source (other casino games) are questioned, as new characters like Chae Na-Yoon appear on the scene.
key_moments: A high-stakes Seven-Card Stud game begins, marked by a heated dispute over player etiquette involving the "Student" participant.
An unseen observer reports on the presence of various affiliated heroes and villains, specifically noting Kim Ha-Jin and expressing anxiety about magical detection.
Despite facing incredibly low odds, the "Student" player defies expectations by winning the card game with a powerful Four-of-a-Kind.
After the game, the winner's newfound extravagant appearance and past casino winnings are questioned, coinciding with the introduction of Chae Na-Yoon and other characters.
